title: Smoky Zesty Algerian Speculaas Spice Mix Tagine
description: A smoky, crisp, and cozy Algerian dish featuring speculaas spice mix, dehydrate-friendly and gluten-free options. This recipe combines the warmth of tagine with the unique flavors of speculaas spice mix.

ingredients.name: Speculaas Spice Mix
ingredients.notes: see below for homemade mix recipe

instructions: In a small bowl, mix together speculaas spice mix and 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
In a large Dutch oven or clay pot, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat.
Add the onion, garlic, and ginger and cook until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the chicken thighs and cook until browned on both sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the prunes, chicken broth, and honey to the pot, stirring to combine.
Transfer the pot to the preheated oven and cook for 1 1/2 hours, or until the chicken is tender and the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the freshly chopped parsley and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
